full_text:
Tissue was finely minced in a sterile petri dish. Then, it was dissociated in 20 mL of Dispase + RQ1-RNAse free DNAse diluted in medium according to the protocol.

Final pellet was resuspended in 5 mL of organoid culture medium

Cell count 1):

total: 3.57 E6

live: 3.15 E6

viability: 88.3 %

Size: 9.9 um

Cell count 2):

total: 3.46 E6

live: 3.07 E6

viability: 88.8 %

Size: 10.1 um

Average cell count: 3.5 E6 / mL

Total volume: 5 mL

Final cell count: 17.5 E6 cells

A). Drug treatment for flow cytometry (48 well plate)

16 conditions, 6 replicates per condition = 96 wells

96 wells x 40 µl x = 3840 µl → round up to 4000 uL

1000 cells/µl

→ make 8 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 500µl each (Total = 4 ml)

volume to take from cell suspension:

ORG full medium → (uL) = 187.5

Cells → 191.6

ome-gel → 70.5 µl

aprotinin → 1.5 µl

thrombin → 1.25 µl

fibrinogen → 10 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for IF in 384-well plate

Leave outer wells empty = 96 wells were plated with cells.

96 wells x 20 µl = 1920 µl → round it to 2000µl

prepare the mix for 384 wells 1000 cells/µl

→ make 4 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 500µl each (Total = 2 ml)

volume to take from cell suspension (µl) for 500 ul of omentum gel mix *4 tubes

ORG full medium → (uL) = 187.5

Cells → 191.6

ome-gel → 70.5 µl

aprotinin → 1.5 µl

thrombin → 1.25 µl

fibrinogen → 10 µl

NOTE: Fibrinogen should be added just before pipetting to the wells. So, add everything to all 4 tubes except Fibrinogen. When you are ready to pipette add Fibrinogen one by one to each tube.

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 25 µl medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

B) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Two vials with 1E6 cells each were collected. One was used as unstained control, and the other one was stained with the antibodies from the drug testing panel according to the protocol.

C) Sample for cryo

→ 2 vials of 2.5E6 cells in 1 mL of STEM CELL BANKER were frozen

Prepare mL of iPDC medium with cytokines

In 48 well plates, 96 wells were used → 96*300ul = 30ml

For 384 wells, 96 wells were used → 96*25ul = 2.5ml

Total medium prepared: 40ml

Since the cultures did not form clumps the next day (as expected of an adnexa sample), further experiments were not done. Flow cytometry was not done because of the cultures lacking clumps.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
